title: Coburgia recurvata

The Gesneriaceae family is a large and diverse group of flowering plants, containing over 3,000 species. These plants are often characterized by their showy flowers and succulent leaves. Coburgia recurvata is likely a rare or lesser-known species within the Gesneriaceae family.
